testcase.name: test_create_recipe_does_not_overwrite_subrecipe
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subrecipe_protection.py:211: in test_create_recipe_does_not_overwrite_subrecipe assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Create should succeed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create should succeed: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","produces_ingredient_id"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_by_product_blocked_for_subrecipe

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error status for empty product_id, got 200 assert 200 in [400, 404, 405] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subrecipe_protection.py:254: in test_delete_by_product_blocked_for_subrecipe assert response.status_code in [400, 404, 405], f"Expected error status for empty product_id, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected error status for empty product_id, got 200 E assert 200 in [400, 404, 405] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_regular_recipe_crud_flow
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subrecipe_protection.py:280: in test_regular_recipe_crud_flow assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Create failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","produces_ingredient_id"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
